{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-120", "name": "Buffer Copy without Checking Size of Input ('Classic Buffer Overflow')"}], "description": "An application that passes in a ciphertext buffer of length greater
than `ptxt.len() + TAG_LEN` to `libcrux_chacha20poly1305::encrypt` or
`libcrux_chacha20poly1305::xchacha20_poly1305::encrypt` would
experience a panic.

## Impact
An application where the length of the ciphertext buffer is under
attacker control could be made to crash.

## Mitigation
The fix makes it so that `libcrux_chacha20poly1305::encrypt` and
`libcrux_chacha20poly1305::xchacha20_poly1305::encrypt` no longer
panic in this case, but instead write out the ciphertext and tag into
the first `ptxt.len() + TAG_LEN` bytes of the provided buffer.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-hc3c-63hc-2r9f", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-19T16:18:33Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hc3c-63hc-2r9f", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-hc3c-63hc-2r9f"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-19T16:18:33Z", "references": ["https://github.com/cryspen/libcrux/pull/1386", "https://rustsec.org/advisories/RUSTSEC-2026-0124.html", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hc3c-63hc-2r9f"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/cryspen/libcrux", "summary": "libcrux: Potential Panic on Overlong Ciphertext Buffer", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-19T16:18:36Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-hc3c-63hc-2r9f", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.0.8", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "libcrux-chacha20poly1305"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.0.8"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: libcrux: Potential Panic on Overlong Ciphertext Buffer
